title: aulonemia effusa
intro: Aulonemia effusa is a species of grass within the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Aulonemia effusa has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its bronchodilatory and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to address these health concerns.
